description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, rounded head featuring short, angular orange hair tied into a side ponytail. The doll wears oversized, round pink glasses and has a small, triangular nose and a simple mouth, giving it a cartoonish appearance. Its body is slender and elongated, dressed in a short-sleeved green shirt and black pants, with pale hands and feet. The arms are extended straight out to the sides, and the legs are close together, creating a T-pose. The facial features are minimalistic, with large, circular eyes and thin eyebrows. The overall design is playful and modern, suitable for display or imaginative play in an urban environment.
description: A stylized doll with orange hair in a side ponytail, large pink glasses, a green shirt, and black pants, posed with arms outstretched. The design is cartoonish and modern, with minimal facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large pink glasses, orange hair, green shirt, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular hair, side ponytail, and the profile of the glasses and face.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the rounded head, hair shape, and the alignment of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail and profile of the face and glasses.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual modern style with a short-sleeved green shirt and slim black pants, no visible patterns or logos, and a simple, playful aesthetic.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a small, straight mouth, wide circular eyes, and thin, slightly arched eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, angular orange hair styled into a side ponytail with a smooth, cartoonish texture.
